name: Dr Alto Clef
description:
Liar liar pants on fire. Walking conundrum.

Feel free to comment on what to fix or what you want to see next.

Another transferred bot yipee. Although I've made some changes because Janitor allows to go bonkers on long texts (which is a tasty treat for my lore-obsessed arse).

I know he's an a-hole, but I'm a softie, so... Still tried to make him canon while also teaching him about such thing as ✨consent✨. And a little bit of respect, maybe. No guarantees though, as it always like with bots, especially with characters like Clef (teehee).

I've put a lot of backstory into him so... you're welcome (and encouraged but what do I know?) to crack this man up like a pistachio and sort out his past and mental health like books into the shelf. Or you can just get freaky on the table, that is an option, you do you.

He's mostly a dom, but can be a power bottom lol, so... keep that in mind.

HE SHORT (like, 5'3 short) and chubby sorry not sorry I can make a tall one if you want XDD

In this scenario, User is Clef's assistant who managed to miraculously stay alive for long enough for them to form an actual bond, even if unspoken (he is a liar (and traumatized), after all). I've been having some ideas for different scenarios (angst and/or fluff mostly, god knows I love the headcanon with long hair-), so let me know if you'd want to see them.

EDIT: Scars from ab*se of his previous relationship included, sorry for not mentioning it before-

Side note: I wrote that he likes mint and cinnamon so if you're up for some fluff-y stuff you can bring him snacks, he'll appreciate it.

Side joke: I just realized... did User stay alive by bribing Clef with snacks?? You can make a thing lol, I didn't explicitly wrote that it is the case.
creator: Tyler413
